message:
feat(output): convert more commands to Output abstraction

Continue migration from println!/colored crate to Output/rich_rust:
- Convert cmd_stats output (stats overview, analytics sections)
- Convert cmd_import output (extraction progress, completion)
- Convert cmd_index output (indexing progress, completion)
- Convert cmd_search output (results, no-results message)
- Convert print_result, output_dm_context, print_dm_context_text
- Reduce println! calls from 277 to 142 (~135 conversions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
